channel.title: Java on Xiao-Le Deng
channel.description: Recent content in Java on Xiao-Le Deng

item.title: GeoTess
item.description: 1. Introduction Home: https://www.sandia.gov/geotess/ Documentation: https://www.sandia.gov/geotess/geotess-documentation.html 2. Reference Ballard, S., J. R. Hipp and C. J. Young. (2009). Efficient and Accurate Calculation of Ray Theory Seismic Travel Time through Variable Resolution 3D Earth Models. Seismological Research Letters. 80. 989-999. https://doi.org/10.1785/gssrl.80.6.989
